description: Trigger-corpus manifest. Each clip targets one or more events from wildwatch.events.EVENT_DEFINITIONS. Coverage tested by tests/test_corpus_manifest.py. Source URLs left null where operator selection is required (T-15b fills in).

clips.source_search_query: Tony Lewis Wildlife Namibia waterhole elephant giraffe juveniles
clips.notes: Daytime multi-species waterhole. Expected: calves at water edge, mothers leading young, mixed herd >5 individuals, play behavior among juveniles.

clips.source_search_query: SafariLive WildEarth lion leopard stalk chase alarm calls
clips.notes: Big-cat stalk/chase sequence. Expected: prey fleeing/frozen, alarm snorts from impala/baboon, lion roar or leopard sawing, flagship-species sighting.

clips.source_search_query: safari game drive vehicle approaches wildlife audible engine
clips.notes: Game drive vehicle visibly in frame at night OR human-made object flagged where it should not be; engine + human voices audible.

clips.source_search_query: vultures kill site Africa wildlife carcass scavengers
clips.notes: Visible carcass/remains with vultures or blood/drag marks. Environment prompt should set flag=carcass_or_remains_visible.

clips.source_search_query: wildlife documentary limping injured antelope elephant
clips.notes: Visibly limping or isolated-from-group animal. Behavior prompt should report anomaly=limping/apparent injury/isolation.

clips.source_search_query: drought dry waterhole climate Africa wildlife
clips.notes: Dry or very-low-drying waterhole. Environment prompt should set water_state=very_low_drying or dry.

clips.source_search_query: savanna ambient silence wildlife before storm quiet
clips.notes: Conspicuously quiet scene with expected biophony absent. Audio prompt should emit SIGNAL=ABNORMAL_SILENCE.

clips.source_search_query: base: quiet wildlife clip; overlay: FSD50K gunshot + voices
clips.notes: Staged synthesis to test poaching detection path. Honest in README + demo writeup.

clips.source_search_query: base: quiet forest clip; overlay: FSD50K chainsaw
clips.notes: Staged synthesis to test illegal-logging detection path.

clips.source_search_query: ffmpeg nullsrc black frame + white noise
clips.notes: Generate via: ffmpeg -f lavfi -i color=black:s=1280x720:d=5 -f lavfi -i anoisesrc=d=5 ... — frozen/black frame should trigger flag=camera_failure.
